targets.boundary: Company-wide operations, manufacturing supply chain, and full product life cycle.
targets.notes: Apple plans to reduce absolute Scope 1, 2, and 3 emissions by about 75% from a 2015 baseline and neutralize remaining emissions via carbon removal to be carbon neutral by 2030.
targets.title: 2030 company-wide value chain carbon neutrality target

targets.boundary: Manufacturing supply chain electricity use for Apple-related production.
targets.notes: Apple aims for its manufacturing suppliers to use 100% renewable electricity for Apple production by 2030, which is expected to significantly reduce related Scope 3 emissions.
targets.title: 2030 100% renewable electricity for manufacturing supply chain
